_README: Per-tool demo GIFs for the guide. Key = tool slug (printed to the browser console on the guide page). Value = ordered list of files in docs/img/ — either "file.gif" or {"file": "x.gif", "caption": "..."}. These are STARTER ideas: edit captions, reorder, add, or delete freely. Files that don't exist yet just hide themselves, so it's safe to list them ahead of recording. A slug listed here overrides the auto-numbering for that tool; remove a slug to fall back to auto-detecting tool-<slug>.gif / -1 / -2 …

control-panel.caption: Open the gear panel and flip a tool on or off.
Rebind a hotkey that clashes with something else.
Paste your GitHub token to enable Map Styler + Issues.

map-styler.caption: Shift+O toggles the power-line shielding overlays.
Coverage check drops numbered red pins on gaps too far from shielding.
Per-category color / opacity / on-off for distribution vs transmission.
Right-click a line to hide it (personal view — never changes real data).

measure-ruler.caption: Shift+R, then click two points to measure the distance.
Shift+R again clears it — no stray marks left behind.

absolute-altitude.caption: Shift+A, then click the map to drop an altitude pin.
Right-click a pin to delete it cleanly.

new-entity-macro.caption: Keys 1-6 drop each entity type instantly — no menu clicks.
Shift+D twice to safely delete (first press just warns).
Turn individual entity keys on/off in the gear panel.

clear-all.caption: Shift+C wipes all your temporary marks at once — real data untouched.

site-setup-tools.caption: Right-click any entity for its details — altitudes in ft + m, click to copy.
SUM opens a searchable, sortable table of every entity on the site.
Click a row to pan the map to it and open its inspector.
Site Summary — donut charts + Copy to Sheets for a formatted export.

mission-bank-tools.caption: Summary panel of every mission in the bank.
Batch-edit altitudes across multiple mission steps at once.

bulk-mission-adder.caption: Shift+B adds a whole batch of missions in one pass.
Tune how it behaves in the gear panel.

quick-mission-editor.caption: Ctrl+Click several steps, then move them together.
Reorder mission steps fast — no slow drag-and-drop.

defaults.caption: Open a site and land on your chosen section automatically.
Switch sites and keep your current section — no more Data Map every time.
Auto-tidy map layers on every new site.

map-nav.caption: Pan the map with W A S D.
Zoom with Q / E; hold Alt to sprint.
Space fits the whole site back into view.

power-line-editor.caption: Drag a vertex to move a point on an existing line.
Add or delete vertices along a line.
Ctrl+Click a handle to branch a new line off a vertex.
Save — the corrected line syncs to GitHub for everyone.

issues.caption: Draw an area on the map and attach a note about the problem.
Status workflow: Open to Ready to Resolved, with priority + filter.
Shared with the team via GitHub; affected entities auto-tagged.

performance-shield.caption: Toggle the network blocks (session-replay, chat, weather) in the gear panel.
Hide the satellite / low-res ortho for a snappier map.

bulk-user-sites.caption: Paste lists of users + sites — matches auto-select.
Pin favorites and drag to reorder them.
Save a preset — a named set of people + role for repeat access.

inspector.caption: Shift+I opens the diagnostic panel showing live map + AIM state.

flight-path-editor.caption: Draw under-vertexed — each segment auto-bands from the terrain underneath.
Hold Alt to peek the ground + AGL under any point of the path.
Auto-step adds vertices where the ground varies too much.
Click a segment number to insert a vertex mid-segment.
Open Path un-closes a snapped loop (reverses Percepto's Close Path).

site-setup-generator-ffz-previewer.caption: Generate auto-builds inspection FFZs + shielded paths and previews them.
Tune the standoff / size / altitudes, then commit through the Apply queue.
Flags out-of-corridor segments + assets it could not reach.
